\text { Given : } \mathrm{E}^{\circ} \mathrm{Cu}^{2+} / \mathrm{Cu} & =0.34 \mathrm{~V} \\\\

\frac{2 \cdot 303 \mathrm{RT}}{\mathrm{~F}} & =0.06 \mathrm{~V}
\end{aligned}$$
